description_long: This bird has a compact, rounded body covered in deep blue plumage with a somewhat jagged, textured appearance. Its head is small and slightly angular, featuring a short, dark beak and two prominent, dark eyes. The legs are long, thin, and black, ending in three-pronged, claw-like feet that give it a striking silhouette. The wings are tucked close to the body, blending into the overall form, while the tail feathers are sharply pointed and splayed, adding to its dynamic look. The surface appears matte and rough, with angular, blocky feather details. The overall impression is of a stylized, urban-adapted bird, possibly inspired by a crow or jay.
description: A compact, deep blue bird with long black legs, a short dark beak, and sharply pointed tail feathers. Its body is textured and angular, giving it a stylized, urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's rounded blue body, long black legs, and splayed, pointed tail feathers.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the bird's broad back, angular feather texture, and the convergence of the tail feathers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the head slightly turned, showing the beak, eye, and the full length of the legs and tail.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the bird's face, short beak, two dark eyes, and the symmetry of its long legs and feet.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid blue with angular, blocky feather texture
